[[inst_casw]]
==== CASW

*Syntax:* casw<.{aq, rl, aqrl}> [SrcL], SrcR, SrcD, ->{t, u, Rd}

*Description:* 32-bit compare-and-swap word: if ([SrcL]==SrcR) [SrcL]=SrcD; RegDst=old([SrcL]). Independent input/output registers.

image::../generated/encodings/enc_casw.svg[CASW encoding,width=800]
